title: Extract on atomic union
description: `Extract<'name' | 'age' | 'createdAt', 'name' | 'createdAt'>` keeps only the members assignable to the second argument, resolving to the `'name' | 'createdAt'` literal union; round-trips identically across JSON and binary.
generated:

function YOw_aKYcmOK(v){return v === 'createdAt'}
